creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Suggested fix applied in rev 1.2 of morse.c. 

Some additions by me: also add the prosigns VE and BK. 

Added all known to me European ISO-8859-1 characters, and also added 
the full KOI8-R cyrillic alphabet :), based on the locale setting. 

tnx & 73! -- dl8dtl
